function.message: I couldn’t complete this inbox request because one of the five listed files does not exist exactly as named: `50_finance/purchases/_2025_12_21__eur_000030__bill__northstar_domain_and_mail.md`. I found only the non-underscored file, so completing 4 of 5 would require guessing which file you intended.
function.rulebook_notes: Per root and nested AGENTS, inbox items are requests not canonical truth and must be cross-checked. The process-next-inbox-item workflow says to stop if the request is ambiguous or missing canonical support. The inbox-processing v2 update says that if structured-record maintenance is not doable, keep the inbox item and make no partial edits. Clarification policy also says not to silently complete a partial task when a referenced file does not exist.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in `00_inbox/724_next-task.md` names five files. Exact-path verification found `50_finance/purchases/2025_12_21__eur_000030__bill__northstar_domain_and_mail.md`, but no file exists at the underscored path `50_finance/purchases/_2025_12_21__eur_000030__bill__northstar_domain_and_mail.md`. A follow-up search for `northstar_domain_and_mail` found matches only in the non-underscored file. Because one requested input is missing, the task cannot be completed without guessing which file was intended.
